Future Star

How It Works

4 Simple Steps to Victory

1

Register

Registration confirms your child as an official The Future Star Contest participant with accurate details.

2

Campaign

You’ll receive a campaign poster to help your child gather votes from friends and family.

3

Vote

Active campaigning and vote gathering are essential to help your child shine as the contest’s star.

4

Win

Winners will be crowned The Future Star, and awarded ₦3,000,000, + school scholarship.

✨ About the Contest

Celebrating
Nigeria's Future Stars

The Future Star Challenge is Nigeria's most exciting children's talent competition for kids aged 0–10. We celebrate brilliance, confidence, and personality. Parents and children campaign together — register, get votes, and win life-changing prizes!

🏆 Grand Winner₦500,000 + 3-yr Scholarship
🥈 1st Runner Up₦300,000
🥉 2nd Runner Up₦200,000
Register Your Child →

For ages

0–10

Years Old
